name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Loaders
notes:
This Building Block detects different loaders used by the Lazarus group activity.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth, wagga
SIGMA Title: Lazarus Loaders
SIGMA Description: Detects different loaders as described in various threat reports on Lazarus group activity


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Loaders on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%cmd.exe /c %' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -p 0x%' and (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%c:\programdata\%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%c:\recycler\%')) AQL filter query

when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%rundll32.exe %' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%c:\programdata\%' and (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.bin,%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.tmp,%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.dat,%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.io,%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.ini,%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.db,%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Loaders on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%cmd.exe /c %' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -p 0x%' and (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%c:\programdata\%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%c:\recycler\%')) AQL filter query

AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%rundll32.exe %' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%c:\programdata\%' and (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.bin,%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.tmp,%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.dat,%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.io,%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.ini,%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.db,%')) AQL filter query
